channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Pentagon Locks Down, Then Opens Up After "Hazardous Materials" False Alarm

media:content.media:description: The Fire Department said that it had units operating at the Pentagon during the incident

item.description: Amid Iran Tensions, Pentagon On Lockdown After "Hazardous Materials Incident"
item.content:encoded: Amid Iran Tensions, Pentagon On Lockdown After "Hazardous Materials Incident"

item.title: After Threatening To Hit Iran "Very Hard Tonight", Trump Calls Off Strikes

media:content.media:description: Trump said the naval blockade will remain in until the deal is finalised

item.description: After Threatening To Hit Iran "Very Hard Tonight", Trump Calls Off Strikes
item.content:encoded: After Threatening To Hit Iran "Very Hard Tonight", Trump Calls Off Strikes

item.title: Putin's War In Ukraine Has Now Outlasted World War I

media:content.media:description: Experts say the biggest difference between the two wars is the technology shaping modern combat

item.description: According to polls, about half of the Ukrainians believe that the war will continue longer and not end before next year. This would push the duration of the war closer to that of World War II, which ended after 6 years of fighting.
item.content:encoded: According to polls, about half of the Ukrainians believe that the war will continue longer and not end before next year. This would push the duration of the war closer to that of World War II, which ended after 6 years of fighting.

item.title: Kenya Pays 50% Premium As Chinese Firm Wins Airport Deal After Adani Agreement Cancelled
item.description: The award to the Chinese state-owned contractor advances long-delayed plans to modernise Kenya's busiest airport, which has been operating beyond its intended capacity
item.content:encoded: The award to the Chinese state-owned contractor advances long-delayed plans to modernise Kenya's busiest airport, which has been operating beyond its intended capacity

item.title: Ship Manager Blames US For Deaths Of 3 Indians, Denies Iran Oil Link

media:content.media:description: The vessel manager argued that the circumstances surrounding the attack have not been explained

item.description: The vessel manager argued that the circumstances surrounding the attack have not been adequately explained and that the families of those who died deserve clear answers regarding what occurred.
item.content:encoded: The vessel manager argued that the circumstances surrounding the attack have not been adequately explained and that the families of those who died deserve clear answers regarding what occurred.

item.title: Israel Plans Relocation Of Bnei Menashe Community From India Within 4 Years

media:content.media:description: Bnei Menashe are a community concentrated primarily in Manipur and Mizoram

item.description: Speaking at a ceremony in the northern Israeli city of Nof Hagalil honouring newly arrived immigrants, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said the government intends to facilitate the relocation of all remaining members of the community.
item.content:encoded: Speaking at a ceremony in the northern Israeli city of Nof Hagalil honouring newly arrived immigrants, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said the government intends to facilitate the relocation of all remaining members of the community.

item.title: '2 Hellfire Missiles': US Admits Attack On 3rd Ship With Indian Crew In Gulf

media:content.media:description: India has strongly condemned the attacks on tankers manned by Indian seafarers in the Gulf

item.description: '2 Hellfire Missiles': US Admits Attack On 3rd Ship With Indian Crew In Gulf
item.content:encoded: '2 Hellfire Missiles': US Admits Attack On 3rd Ship With Indian Crew In Gulf

item.title: OpenAI mulls price cuts as it prepares for public market debut: Report
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman had earlier identified rising costs as a huge problem.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman had earlier identified rising costs as a huge problem.

item.title: Will Hit Iran "Very Hard" Tonight, Take Venezuela-Like Control Of Its Oil: Trump

media:content.media:description: This latest threat comes on the heels of a similar warning issued by the US president yesterday.

item.description: Will Hit Iran "Very Hard" Tonight, Take Venezuela-Like Control Of Its Oil: Trump

item.title: 2 Days After 30 Deaths, 16 Killed As Forces Open Fire On Protesters In PoK

media:content.media:description: The demonstration soon turned violent with the Pak army unleashing gunfire on the crowd

item.description: 2 Days After 30 Deaths, 16 Killed As Forces Open Fire On Protesters In PoK
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1111785/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>2 Days After 30 Deaths, 16 Killed As Forces Open Fire On Protesters In PoK

item.title: UK Defence Minister Resigns, Criticises Starmer's Plans To Keep Nation Safe

media:content.media:description: "I am being forced to make decisions that would reduce the readiness of our forces," Healey said.

item.description: British defence minister John Healey quit on Thursday in a dispute over military spending, accusing Prime Minister Keir Starmer of failing to commit the government resources that are needed to defend the country at a time of heightened threat.
item.content:encoded: British defence minister John Healey quit on Thursday in a dispute over military spending, accusing Prime Minister Keir Starmer of failing to commit the government resources that are needed to defend the country at a time of heightened threat.

item.title: Scientists Discover World's Largest Whale Graveyard With Bones Over 5 Million Years Old

media:content.media:description: The largest modern carcass found was that of a five-metre-long Antarctic minke whale.

item.description: Some of the fossils recovered from the site date back as far as 5.3 million years, making it the oldest known whale graveyard ever documented.
item.content:encoded: Some of the fossils recovered from the site date back as far as 5.3 million years, making it the oldest known whale graveyard ever documented.

item.title: Man Finds 16th-Century Diamond Ring Worth Rs 19 Lakh With Metal Detector

media:content.media:description: The ring is expected to attract bids of between £15,000 (roughly Rs 19 lakh).

item.description: The ring is expected to attract bids of between £15,000 and £20,000.
item.content:encoded: The ring is expected to attract bids of between £15,000 and £20,000.

item.title: Indians In UK Living In 'Fear' After 'Racist' Arson Attacks In Belfast

media:content.media:description: Firefighters rescued several people from burning houses

item.description: Videos on social media showed a crowd of protesters hurling objects toward police vehicles, and officers responding by firing water cannons at them.
item.content:encoded: Videos on social media showed a crowd of protesters hurling objects toward police vehicles, and officers responding by firing water cannons at them.

item.title: Elon Musk's XAI Accused Of Illegally Firing Engineer Who Raised Safety Concerns
item.description: The lawsuit comes ahead of SpaceX's planned initial public offering, the largest ever, on Friday.
item.content:encoded: The lawsuit comes ahead of SpaceX's planned initial public offering, the largest ever, on Friday.

item.title: Third Ship With Indian Sailors On Fire Near Oman

media:content.media:description: MT Jalveer is the third ship with an Indian crew to come under attack near Oman in recent days

item.description: The incident was confirmed by the Indian Embassy in Oman, which said it was closely monitoring the situation and coordinating with the local authorities for further details.
item.content:encoded: The incident was confirmed by the Indian Embassy in Oman, which said it was closely monitoring the situation and coordinating with the local authorities for further details.

item.title: "Stay Safe": UK Cops Warn Of Unrest In Belfast Over "Hit List" Of Migrants
item.description: Police warned that those creating or sharing the list could be committing a criminal offence and deployed 200 additional officers to help prevent further violence.
item.content:encoded: Police warned that those creating or sharing the list could be committing a criminal offence and deployed 200 additional officers to help prevent further violence.

item.title: 3 Indian Sailors Killed In US Attack On Ship Off Oman Coast
item.description: 3 Indian Sailors Killed In US Attack On Ship Off Oman Coast: Union Minister Sarbananda Sonowal
item.content:encoded: 3 Indian Sailors Killed In US Attack On Ship Off Oman Coast: Union Minister Sarbananda Sonowal

item.title: Video Captures Moment When US Struck Tanker Carrying Indian Crew

media:content.media:description: The International Maritime Organization (IMO) also condemned the attack on tanker near Strait of Hormuz

item.description: A missile tore through the engine room of the oil tanker Settebello, setting off a fire onboard. The Palau-flagged vessel was sailing 20 nautical miles northeast of Omani port of Sohar when the incident occurred.
item.content:encoded: A missile tore through the engine room of the oil tanker Settebello, setting off a fire onboard. The Palau-flagged vessel was sailing 20 nautical miles northeast of Omani port of Sohar when the incident occurred.
